pricing.title: Licensing
pricing.subtitle: Every photo is available to download instantly via PayPal. All prices in EUR.
pricing.smallUse: Perfect for digital use, social media, and small prints up to A4.
pricing.fullUse: Maximum detail for large-format printing, framing, and archival use.
pricing.businessDesc: Using a photo for advertising, editorial, or any commercial purpose? Get in touch and I'll put together a custom quote.
pricing.step1Desc: Browse the portfolio and open any image you love.
pricing.step2Desc: Pick Small (€19) or Full Resolution (€49) and pay securely via PayPal.
pricing.step3Desc: A download link lands in your inbox within minutes — valid for 14 days.
pricing.note: Personal use only. The photographer retains full copyright. A license grants usage rights, not ownership.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: DAVEJAVU
about.storyBody: I'm David, Portuguese by birth and living in Barcelona. Photography started as a way to document a big trip and grew into one of the few hobbies I actually stick with. I like the technical side as much as the artistic one, and I'm happiest either lost in the woods or on top of a canyon.
about.philosophyBody: Landscapes, mostly. The view from a summit, smooth river rocks, anything green and saturated after rain. I'm drawn to water more than most things: reflections, long exposures, the way a stream looks when you give the shutter enough time to think about it. Moody weather is a gift. Flowers, birds, textures, patterns in bark or stone all count too. If it sits still long enough to compose, I'll probably point a lens at it.
about.gearBody: Body is a Sony A7C II, paired most days with a Tamron 25-200mm f/2.8-5.6 for range or a Sony 85mm f/1.8 when I want something cleaner. I upgraded from a Canon 80D a while back and I'm still finding things the new setup does better. I own three tripods and I'm putting real effort into not owning four.
about.ctaBody: Browse the portfolio or get in touch about a license.
